opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is cracking and burning everywhere, and I'm so deeply exhausted I can't even sit up in bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My psoriasis exploded over two days after a stressful period — my skin is fissuring and bleeding and I'm wiped out; my spouse is helping me.

symptom_narrative.onset: a severe flare over 48 hours after high stress
symptom_narrative.character: thick scaly plaques spreading, fissuring and bleeding, with burning skin tightness and crushing fatigue
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: skin is agony; a full-body battery drain
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: torso and extensor surfaces (elbows/knees); cracks bleeding
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a flare of my known psoriasis after stress and running out of my ointment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: emollients and keeping still help a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profound fatigue; no widespread pus-filled bumps and no high fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have plaque psoriasis and flare, but not this severe

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: high-potency topical steroid ointment (ran out 3 days ago)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my spouse is helping with hydration and skin care

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the skin flare and fatigue clearly; spouse assists

objective_data_offered.value: thick scaly plaques over much of my torso and elbows/knees with bleeding cracks; no pus-filled bumps and no honey-coloured crusting
my heart feels a bit fast and I'm exhausted
